languages.text: "Их цель — уничтожение священного центрального бура — величайшей из технологий станции — путем извлечения из него анкер-ядра — источника Движущей силы, что питает наши машины. Столь немыслимое святотатство — разрушение священных технологий — приведет к непоправимым последствиям, грозящим распаду священных машинных цепочек и потоплению станции".

traits.locale_text: "Обвинение: их цель — уничтожить священный центральный бур, вырвав из него анкер-ядро — источник Движущей силы, что питает станцию. Столь немыслимое святотатство приведет к непоправимым последствиям, грозящим распаду священных машинных цепочек и потоплению станции".

languages.text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."
languages.original_text: "Их цель — уничтожение священного центрального бура — величайшей из технологий станции — путем извлечения из него анкер-ядра — источника Движущей силы, что питает наши машины. Столь немыслимое святотатство — разрушение священных технологий — приведет к непоправимым последствиям, грозящим распаду священных машинных цепочек и потоплению станции".

Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

Such inconceivable sacrilege will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine chains and the sinking of the station."

"Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

languages.text: 「罪状：聖なる中央ドリルを破壊する目的で、その根幹であるアンカーコアを破壊しようとしている。この想像を絶する聖なる行為は、聖なる機械回路の崩壊や、駅舎の沈没につながる不可逆的な結果をもたらす」
languages.original_text: "Accusation: their goal is to destroy the sacred central drill by ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers the station. Such inconceivable sacrilege will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: 「罪状：聖なる中央ドリルを破壊する目的で、その根幹であるアンカーコアを破壊しようとしている。この想像を絶する聖なる行為は、聖なる機械回路の崩壊や、駅舎の沈没につながる不可逆的な結果をもたらす。」

languages.text: "Amaçları, makinelerimize güç veren Devinim Gücü'nün kaynağı olup istasyonumuzun teknolojilerinin en büyüğü sayılan çapa çekirdeğini söküp alarak kutsal merkezî matkabı yok etmek. Kutsal teknolojinin yıkımı gibi akıl almaz bir hürmetsizlik, kutsal makine devrelerinin parçalanmasına ve istasyonun batmasına yol açabilecek geri döndürülemez sonuçlar doğuracaktır."
languages.original_text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: "Amaçları, makinelerimize güç veren Devinim Gücü'nün kaynağı olup istasyonumuzun teknolojilerinin en büyüğü sayılan çapa çekirdeğini söküp alarak kutsal merkezî matkabı yok etmek. Kutsal teknolojinin yıkımı gibi akıl almaz bir hürmetsizlik, kutsal makine devrelerinin parçalanmasına ve istasyonun batmasına yol açabilecek geri döndürülemez sonuçlar doğuracaktır."

languages.text: «Pretenden destruir la sagrada perforadora central, la mayor de las tecnologías de la estación, arrancándole el núcleo de anclaje, origen de la Fuerza Motriz que alimenta nuestras máquinas. Tan inconcebible sacrilegio, ruina de la bendita tecnología, tendrá repercusiones irreversibles que causarán la desintegración de los sagrados circuitos mecánicos y el ulterior hundimiento de la estación».
languages.original_text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: «Pretenden destruir la sagrada perforadora central, la mayor de las tecnologías de la estación, arrancándole el núcleo de anclaje, origen de la Fuerza Motriz que alimenta nuestras máquinas. Tan inconcebible sacrilegio, ruina de la bendita tecnología, tendrá repercusiones irreversibles que causarán la desintegración de los sagrados circuitos mecánicos y el ulterior hundimiento de la estación».

languages.text: “他们的目标是拔出锚核，即机械的源力来源，从而摧毁星站最伟大的科技成果——神圣的中央钻机。此等难以想象的亵渎行为，即对受祝技术的破坏，将引发不可逆转的后果，或可导致神圣机械回路全面崩解并使星站沉没。”
languages.original_text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: “他们的目标是拔出锚核，即机械的源力来源，从而摧毁星站最伟大的科技成果——神圣的中央钻机。此等难以想象的亵渎行为，即对受祝技术的破坏，将引发不可逆转的后果，或可导致神圣机械回路全面崩解并使星站沉没。”

languages.text: « Leur objectif consiste à détruire le complexe de forage sacré... la plus importante des technologies de la station... en arrachant son noyau ancestral... la source de la Force Motrice qui alimente nos machines. Aussi inconcevable puisse-t-il paraître, un tel sacrilège... la ruine d'une technologie bénie... aurait des conséquences irréversibles susceptibles d'aboutir à la désintégration des circuits de la plateforme et au naufrage de la station. »
languages.original_text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: « Leur objectif consiste à détruire le complexe de forage sacré... la plus importante des technologies de la station... en arrachant son noyau ancestral... la source de la Force Motrice qui alimente nos machines. Aussi inconcevable puisse-t-il paraître, un tel sacrilège... la ruine d'une technologie bénie... aurait des conséquences irréversibles susceptibles d'aboutir à la désintégration des circuits de la plateforme et au naufrage de la station. »

languages.text: "Ihr Ziel ist die Zerstörung des heiligen Zentralbohrers — der großartigsten Technologie der Station — durch die Entfernung seines Ankerkerns ... die Quelle der Antriebskraft, die unsere Maschinen speist. Ein derart unvorstellbares Sakrileg — die Zerstörung einer gesegneten Technologie — hätte unwiderrufliche Konsequenzen, die die Desintegration der Schaltkreise der heiligen Maschine und den Untergang der Station nach sich ziehen könnten."
languages.original_text: "Their goal is the destruction of the sacred central drill — the greatest of the station's technologies — by means of ripping out its anchor-core — the source of the Motive Force that powers our machines. Such inconceivable sacrilege — ruination of blessed technology — will have irreversible consequences that may lead to the disintegration of the sacred machine circuits and the sinking of the station."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr Ziel ist die Zerstörung des heiligen Zentralbohrers — der großartigsten Technologie der Station — durch die Entfernung seines Ankerkerns ... die Quelle der Antriebskraft, die unsere Maschinen speist.
